hero.summary: I promote gender equity in STEM through technology education, student leadership, and projects with social impact.

about: 8th-semester Software Technology Engineering student at Universidad Autónoma de Nuevo León, with experience teaching technology—especially web programming, mobile development, and robotics—to girls and teenagers. Strong commitment to continuous learning through courses and certifications. Leadership, teamwork, and time-management skills strengthened by serving as president of a student group. Focused on generating impact and adding value in every project.

experience.title: Technology Facilitator – Tecnolochicas Program
items: Taught web development, robotics, mobile app development, and AI classes to middle and high school girls.
Promoted gender equity in technology, impacting more than 250 students in one year.
Earned certifications to teach HTML/CSS for Beginners, App Development, Intro to Robotics, and Intro to AI.

experience.title: President of the Software Technology Engineering Student Group
items: Led a student group that fostered academic, professional, and social development in the university community.
Planned and coordinated academic events including conferences, workshops, and technology fairs.
Designed strategies to strengthen belonging and increase active member participation.
